components.title: GRC Engineering Pipeline
components.description: A policy-as-code pipeline that defines compliant AWS storage, tests controls, gates pull requests, signs evidence, monitors the account, and maps implementation claims to verifiable proof.
components.purpose: Provide machine-verifiable assurance for infrastructure controls and their supporting evidence.

control-implementations.description: Implementation of the four NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 controls demonstrated by this repository.

implemented-requirements.description: The primary and access-log S3 buckets use explicit server-side encryption configuration, while the pull-request gate rejects Terraform plans that omit encryption. The linked signed bundle contains the SC-28 Conftest result produced by the gate.
S3 Block Public Access is enabled for both buckets, and the policy gate rejects plans that permit public access. The linked signed bundle contains the AC-3 Conftest result produced by the gate.

The primary bucket sends access records to a dedicated logging bucket with enforced ownership controls. The signed gate bundle provides the contemporaneous policy results and workflow summary for the reviewed Terraform plan.

Versioning and required default tags are declared as Terraform configuration, and the pull-request gate rejects plans missing the required configuration. The linked signed bundle contains the CM-6 Conftest result produced by the gate.
